title: Viking Women From Venus
description: The Viking women from Venus are fighting one another to be the bride of the volcano. The more radioactive lava they drink, the stronger they become.
altHero: Viking women with vampire fangs holding big bowls while standing by a volcano
alt2: men watching the women drinking from the large bowls
alt3: man putting on a hazmat suit
alt4: man in hazmat suit shielding his face from a bright light
